checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.unavailableDesc: This experience is not available for direct purchase.

checkoutSuccess.confirmed: Your booking has been confirmed. Here's a summary of your order.
checkoutSuccess.processingDesc: Your payment is being confirmed. This usually takes just a few seconds. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.

checkoutCancel.title: Payment cancelled
checkoutCancel.subtitle: Your payment was not processed. No charges have been made to your account. You can try again anytime.

addonsStep.noAddons: No add-ons available for this experience.
addonsStep.canContinue: You can continue to the next step.
addonsStep.enhance: Enhance your experience with optional add-ons.

customerInfo.intro: We'll use this to send your order confirmation and tickets.
customerInfo.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.

orderSummary.title: Order Summary
orderSummary.disclaimer: This total is indicative. The final amount will be confirmed at checkout.

reviewStep.disclaimer: The final amount will be verified before payment is processed.

paymentStep.consent: I accept the <termsLink>Terms of Service</termsLink>, <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink> and <refundLink>Refund Policy</refundLink>
paymentStep.consentRequired: You must accept the terms to proceed.
paymentStep.stripeDisclosure: Payments processed securely by Stripe. Your card information is never stored on our servers.
paymentStep.errorDeclined: Your card was declined. Please try another payment method.
paymentStep.errorExpired: Your card has expired. Please use a different card.
paymentStep.initError: Could not initialize payment. Please try again.
